visualEvidenceRequired: verify safe actions show visible nearby before/after state feedback
contractScopeNotes: uiContract is derived from static Android analysis and is a planning aid, not a complete UI specification.
Treat listed screens, routes, actions, state feedback, and visual evidence as the minimum known UI evidence.
If source-visible UI behavior is absent from uiContract, preserve it and update matrix/checklist evidence instead of dropping it.
sourceReviewRequired: re-read relevant source files before implementing or closing UI-related rows
re-read layouts, menus, preference XML, drawable/theme resources, adapters, navigation, and back-stack code when present
check runtime state, permission/result callbacks, data refresh, and item-action flows that static analysis may miss

implementationGroups.title: Verification and evidence policy
requiredBehaviors: Verify the phase's implemented behavior with focused tests, manual/emulator evidence, or explicit verificationEvidence.
riskHints: target tests only count as strong evidence when backed by latest test gate PASS or explicit harness blocker
build pass alone does not close per-feature behavior
manual review evidence must point to concrete target endpoints
acceptanceEvidence: Update source-coverage-matrix.json after implementation with targetEndpoints, tests, parityLevel, and verificationEvidence.
If tests cannot run, record the concrete harness blocker instead of claiming test PASS.

matchedGroups.title: Home discovery content and restaurant selection
requiredBehaviors: Home sections appear in the same source order.
A selected restaurant is saved before detail navigation occurs.
riskHints: Do not push home-specific state into the global shell.
Search and filter controls are visible behavior even without backend filtering.
acceptanceEvidence: Target tests verify selection command ordering.
Build gate passes for phase-04-home-history-discovery.
uiContracts: home top section routes to profile
restaurant tap stores selection then routes to detail
dataContracts: ads, food items, restaurants, and favourites are read from repositories

matchedGroups.title: History tabs and favourites reuse
requiredBehaviors: History preserves tab-local state and list rendering semantics.
Selection command matches home/detail flow.
riskHints: The source history section is largely placeholder content; keep visible structure without inventing backend behavior.
acceptanceEvidence: Target history store test proves selection command behavior.
Page build shows tab sections with the expected labels and ordering.
uiContracts: history page shows search bar and tabs
restaurant tap stores selection then routes to detail
dataContracts: liked restaurants come from the same session repository as home

coordinationNotes: Prefer extending existing route/navigation/state surfaces over creating parallel shells.
If a shared surface must change, keep the change minimal and update only evidence rows tied to this group.
UI groups should preserve route exclusivity, back behavior, visible action feedback, and page-specific builders.
